title: dalbergia glabra
intro: Dalbergia glabra, also known as the smooth dalbergia, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems. The plant's extracts and leaves are known to possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Dalbergia glabra, such as infusions and decoctions, are commonly used in traditional medicine, and its bark is also used to make a medicinal tea.
